item.title: Lebanon to delay May elections due to conflict with Israel, officials say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT, March 3 - Lebanon's leaders have agreed on a plan to postpone parliamentary elections scheduled for May and to extend parliament's term by two years after the resumption of conflict between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah this week and growing war in the Middle East, two senior Lebanese officials said.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Oman renews push for diplomacy, says ‘off-ramps available’ in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Oman had been mediating talks between Iran and the US before Washington attacked Tehran.
Matched: war(+3), ceasefire(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Are US-Israeli attacks against Iran legal under international law?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Analysts say the joint US-Israeli strikes against Iran appear to breach the UN Charter's prohibition on aggression.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Lebanon sucked deeper into war as Hezbollah, Israel trade blows
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT/JERUSALEM, March 3 - Lebanon was pulled deeper into the war in the Middle East on Tuesday as the Iran-backed Lebanese group Hezbollah launched missiles at Israel for a second consecutive day and Israel sent troops into the south and carried out waves of airstrikes.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MOSCOW, March 3 - When President Donald Trump returned to the White House last year, some Russian hardliners were cautiously optimistic, hoping his unpredictability and transactional nature might benefit Moscow on Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Sudan accuses Ethiopia for the first time of involvement in its civil war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 3 - Sudan has accused Ethiopia of allowing drones to be launched from its territory into Sudan to carry out attacks in February and March, the first time it has directly accused its powerful neighbour of involvement in the three-year civil war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Iran warns European countries from joining the war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman has warned European countries against joining the ongoing war with Israel and the US.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Merz says he urged Trump to increase pressure on Putin
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - German Chancellor Friedrich Merz, speaking after a meeting with Donald Trump on Tuesday, said he had urged the president to put pressure on Russian President Vladimir Putin over the war in Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump's national security team comes to convince Congress to back Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - President Donald Trump's top national security advisers were to spend much of the day on Tuesday making the case to members of Congress for the U.S.-Israel war on Iran, as Democrats and some of his fellow Republicans clamored for more information.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UK, France send warships, air defence assets to Cyprus after drone attack
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The development comes after an Iranian-made drone crashed into the UK's military base in Cyprus.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Britain, France and Greece send air-defence forces to Cyprus base after drone strike
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Britain will join France and Greece in bolstering defences in Cyprus by sending a warship and helicopters to its military airbase.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump says 'everything's been knocked out' in Iran
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
US President Donald Trump said Iran's military has been "knocked out" and offered no clear plan for the country’s leadership.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Britain sends destroyer and helicopters with counter-drone tech to Cyprus
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
LONDON, March 3 - Britain is deploying HMS Dragon, an air defence destroyer, to Cyprus after the runway of its Akrotiri base there was hit by an Iranian-made drone.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump denounces UK, Spain over Iran stance
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The US President Donald Trump said he is "not happy with the UK" and threatened to end "all trade" with Spain over their stance on Iran strikes.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Epstein estate's $35 million settlement with accusers wins preliminary judge approval
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
NEW YORK, March 3 - A U.S. judge granted preliminary approval on Tuesday to an agreement for Jeffrey Epstein's estate to pay as much as $35 million to resolve a class action lawsuit that accused two of the disgraced financier's advisers of aiding and abetting his sex trafficking of young women and teenage girls.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: No easy way out for tens of thousands looking to leave Gulf amid Iran conflict
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Foreigners have been left with few options for leaving a region suddenly engulfed by war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iranian missiles and drones fired at Gulf countries
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 3 - Here are statistics released by Gulf defence ministries on drones and missiles that Iran has fired at their territories since the start of the U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran:
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump hosts Germany’s Merz against backdrop of Iran strikes, tariff threats
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Besides the US-Israel war on Iran, the two leaders planned to discuss trade and Russia's war on Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: What are the implications of Iran’s strikes on Gulf Arab states?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Iran is launching attacks across the Gulf region after the US-Israel operation against the country.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Father of accused Georgia school shooter convicted of second-degree murder
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ATLANTA, March 3 - A man who gave his troubled son a rifle for Christmas that the boy allegedly later used to kill four people at a high school in Georgia was convicted on Tuesday of 27 charges including second-degree murder in a rare U.S. legal case in which a parent was prosecuted following the actions of a child in a mass shooting.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Trump contradicts Rubio, says Israel didn’t force him to launch war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Donald Trump denied that Israel forced him into attacking Iran, contradicting his own Secretary of State.
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: ‘Ships now fear crossing the Strait of Hormuz’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
“Ships are now afraid to cross the Strait of Hormuz, and that has profound implications for the global economy.”
Matched: economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Minnesota launches investigation that could bring charges against federal immigration officers
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US debuts suicide drone in Iran after fast-tracked Pentagon procurement
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 3 - The U.S. successfully debuted a low‑cost suicide drone in combat in Iran just eight months after its Pentagon unveiling, as the U.S. pushes to accelerate weapons programs.
Matched: ai(+3)
